name: finance_timeseries
description: Universal data spine: OHLCV time series for every asset class on ONE shared time axis (stocks, FRED macro, futures, crypto, and prediction-market odds), with per-series return and annualized-volatility stats. PRESETS ARE THE POWER FEATURE — the `preset` arg pulls a whole curated domain in ONE call (17 available) and composes with ad-hoc `tickers` in the same call (e.g. preset=macro + tickers=NVDA,SMH gives the macro backdrop plus your names). Key presets: `macro` (34 series — CPI/PCE/jobs/GDP/rates/debt/M2 + live oil/gold/BTC), `recession` (Sahm rule, 10Y-2Y & 10Y-3M, claims, Chicago Fed), `credit` (full ICE BofA OAS stack IG→BBB→HY→BB→B→CCC→EM), `financial_conditions` (NFCI/STLFSI/VIX), `inflation`, `labor`, `housing`, `yield_curve` (1mo–30Y), `real_rates` (TIPS+breakevens), `consumer_credit`, `fed_balance_sheet` (QE/QT plumbing), `liquidity`, `forex_majors`, `crypto`, plus IBKR futures baskets `energy`/`commodities`/`treasuries` (full list + aliases in the `preset` arg). Reach for a preset before hand-listing tickers. For ad-hoc tickers, 8 providers auto-detect by pattern: stocks/ETFs/futures→Yahoo, FRED→FRED (or FRED: prefix), IBKR:→Interactive Brokers 15-min-delayed futures/FX/equities (e.g. IBKR:FUT:CL:NYMEX, IBKR:CASH:EUR:IDEALPRO), CLEV:→Cleveland Fed inflation nowcast, KX*→Kalshi, numeric 6+digit→Polymarket, PYTH:→24/7 oracle, BN:→Binance. `sources` lists providers returned; every candle has a 't' timestamp — check it for freshness.

preset.description: Pass preset=list to get the full catalog with each preset's exact tickers; preset=<name> pulls the basket and composes with `tickers` in the same call (e.g. preset=macro + tickers=NVDA,SMH). 17 presets: macro, yield_curve, liquidity, credit (ICE BofA OAS), financial_conditions (NFCI/STLFSI4/VIX), recession (Sahm/spreads/claims), fed_balance_sheet (QE/QT), housing (Case-Shiller/starts/mortgage), labor (NFP/JOLTS/wages), inflation (CPI/PCE/sticky/median), real_rates (TIPS), consumer_credit (delinquency/SLOOS), forex_majors, crypto, energy (WTI/Brent/NG/RBOB/HO/Gasoil via IBKR), commodities (CL/GC/SI/HG/grains/softs via IBKR), treasuries (ZT/ZF/ZN/ZB/VIX futures via IBKR). IBKR-backed baskets auto-fall-back to Yahoo front-month when IB Gateway is down.

tickers.description: Comma-separated. Stocks: AAPL,SPY,CL=F. FRED: UNRATE,T10Y2Y. IBKR futures: IBKR:FUT:CL:NYMEX, IBKR:FUT:GC:COMEX. IBKR FX: IBKR:CASH:EUR:IDEALPRO. IBKR equities: IBKR:STK:2222:TADAWUL. Cleveland Fed: CLEV:CPI,CLEV:COREPCE. Pyth: PYTH:OIL,PYTH:BTC. Kalshi: KXNBERRECESSQ-Q1-2026. Polymarket: 609655. Binance: BN:BTCUSDT. Mix freely in one call.

as_of.description: End timestamp for the window (RFC3339 or YYYY-MM-DD). Pin this for reproducible cache hits and historical reconstruction. Defaults to now.

start.description: Explicit window start (RFC3339 or YYYY-MM-DD). Must be used with end.

end.description: Explicit window end (RFC3339 or YYYY-MM-DD). Must be used with start.

provider.description: Force a specific provider (auto|yahoo|fred|ibkr|pyth|binance). Default auto routes by ticker prefix.

max_points_per_ticker.description: Safety cap. Errors if window×granularity would exceed this; suggests a coarser granularity.

name: finance_movers
description: Largest day movers across Yahoo Finance day-gainer/day-loser screeners or an explicit ticker list. Filter by direction, percent move, price, volume, min/max market cap, and sort by percent, market cap, dollar volume, or estimated market-cap value change. In provider=auto mode, uses IBKR Gateway for price/change when configured and Yahoo Finance otherwise; Yahoo is also used to enrich IBKR results with market cap metadata.

universe.description: Candidate universe: day_movers, day_gainers, day_losers, or tickers. Default day_movers.

tickers.description: Comma-separated explicit tickers. If supplied, overrides screener discovery.

sort_by.description: Ranking metric. value_change = abs(market_cap * change_pct). Default value_change.

provider.description: Price/change provider. Auto uses IBKR when configured, otherwise Yahoo.

limit.description: Number of movers to return. Default 25.

scan_limit.description: Candidate count per Yahoo screener leg before local filtering/sorting. Default 100, max 250.

ibkr_market_data_type.description: Optional IBKR market data type: 1 live, 2 frozen, 3 delayed, 4 delayed-frozen.

include_extended_hours.description: If true, also fetch pre-market / after-hours move and surface as extended_price, extended_change_pct, extended_session. Sort metrics combine regular + extended when this is enabled.

name: finance_rate_path
description: Aggregated Polymarket+Kalshi probabilities per FOMC meeting (hold/cut/hike buckets). DERIVED — combines multiple prediction markets per meeting via volume-weighted average. Returns: meetings[] (per-meeting hold/cut/hike + n_markets + volume_total, dates snapped to actual FOMC decision day), year_view (cuts_distribution, eoy_rate_distribution, cut_by_meeting_distribution from cardinality markets), compound_paths[] (joint multi-meeting Pause-Pause-Pause paths). For raw individual markets use finance_odds.

name: finance_odds
description: Prediction market discovery + live pricing (Kalshi + Polymarket). Use single specific words for search — multi-word phrases return garbage. Examples: 'recession', 'tariff', 'fed', 'oil', 'iran'. Returns probabilities, volume (USD), and bid/ask. For probability HISTORY over time, use finance_timeseries with the market ticker instead.

search.description: Single-word keyword works best (e.g. recession, tariff, fed, bitcoin, oil, iran, hormuz)

live.description: Fetch fresh prices from exchange APIs (default: true)

orderbook.description: Include Polymarket orderbook depth in returned markets

depth.description: Number of bid/ask levels per outcome. Defaults to 5 if orderbook=true. Polymarket only.

list_series.description: Kalshi only. List available series (top-level groupings).

provider.description: Force a specific venue. Default auto.

market.description: Specific market ticker or Polymarket numeric ID.

min_volume.description: Minimum 24h USD volume filter on local-cache search.

top.description: Return top N markets after ranking. Different from `limit`: limit=API page size, top=post-rank cutoff.

sort_by.description: Sort key for local-cache search. Default relevance.

profile.description: Query profile. macro narrows to Fed/CPI/etc., broad casts wider.

country.description: Country filter for local-cache search (v1: US only).

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for Kalshi list endpoints.

deltas_only.description: Only return markets that changed since last sync. Requires sync delta index.

explain.description: Include compact ranking explanations in local-cache search output.

max_pages.description: Max pages to fetch from Kalshi list endpoints. Default unbounded.

min_delta_pp.description: Minimum absolute probability move (percentage points) since last sync. Requires sync delta index.

name: finance_options
description: Options chain with provider-native quotes/IV where available, put/call OI ratio, max pain, and vol skew. Default provider is auto: Yahoo baseline plus opportunistic IBKR delayed/model overlay when Gateway/TWS is reachable. Use provider=yahoo for Yahoo-only or provider=ibkr for IBKR-only debugging. Yahoo IV is passthrough and filtered fail-closed for placeholder values; Yahoo does not provide Greeks. Max pain filters out pre-split strike artifacts. For full chain across ALL expirations with IV term structure and OI concentration, pass all=true. Top-level `atm_iv` mirrors `metrics.atm_iv` (jq `.atm_iv`); in `all=true` mode it reflects the nearest non-expired snapshot's ATM IV.

ticker.description: Underlying ticker (e.g. SPY, NVDA, AAPL, QQQ)

provider.description: Data provider. Default auto uses Yahoo baseline and overlays IBKR delayed/model fields when Gateway/TWS is reachable. Use yahoo for Yahoo-only or ibkr for direct IBKR-only.

ibkr_account.description: Optional IBKR account override when provider=ibkr.

ibkr_host.description: Optional IBKR host override when provider=ibkr.

ibkr_port.description: Optional IBKR port override when provider=ibkr.

ibkr_client_id.description: Optional IBKR client id override when provider=ibkr.

ibkr_market_data_type.description: Optional IBKR market data type: 1 live, 2 frozen, 3 delayed, 4 delayed-frozen.

as_of.description: Optional as-of timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339). Current options providers support live/delayed snapshot chains only; historical full-chain as_of requests are rejected instead of relabeled.

all.description: Fetch ALL expirations with cross-expiry analytics: IV term structure, OI concentration, max pain range. Large output auto-saves to file.

summary.description: Return summary metrics only, no full chain (default: true)

near_money.description: Only return strikes within this % of the underlying (e.g. 5)

target_dte.description: Target days to expiry. If set without explicit expiry, picks the nearest listed expiry.

expirations.description: List available expirations only (no chain data).

expiry.description: Specific expiration date (YYYY-MM-DD). Use --expirations first to see valid dates.

type.description: Filter chain by option type. Default both.

name: finance_fundamentals
description: Quarterly financial statements: income statement, balance sheet, cash flow. Not for ETFs — use finance_timeseries instead.

tickers.description: Comma-separated list of tickers, e.g. AAPL,MSFT,NVDA. Single ticker returns array of 1.

name: finance_search
description: Search for ticker symbols or FRED macro series IDs by name. Use before timeseries when you don't know the exact ticker/series ID.

query.description: Search query (e.g. tesla, unemployment, S&P 500, crude oil)

provider.description: Search provider. Default auto uses the normal Yahoo+FRED discovery path; ibkr uses IBKR contract search when Gateway/TWS is reachable.

ibkr_account.description: Optional IBKR account override when provider=ibkr.

ibkr_host.description: Optional IBKR host override when provider=ibkr.

ibkr_port.description: Optional IBKR port override when provider=ibkr.

ibkr_client_id.description: Optional IBKR client id override when provider=ibkr.

ibkr_market_data_type.description: Optional IBKR market data type: 1 live, 2 frozen, 3 delayed, 4 delayed-frozen.

name: finance_filings
description: Download recent SEC filings by ticker. Returns SEC metadata, filing URLs, local primary-document paths, saved filing index JSON, optionally all filing attachments, and optionally inline raw primary-document text with raw_text=true.

download.description: Download primary filing documents and index JSON to local cache. Default: true

single_file.description: Download exactly one file: the primary document for the most recent matching filing. Forces limit=1 and skips index/exhibits. Default: false

download_all.description: Download every file listed in each filing index, including exhibits/attachments. Default: false

important_exhibits.description: Download filtered useful text exhibits such as EX-99, earnings releases, and slides while skipping image/XBRL/support noise. Default: true unless download=false

include_text.description: Deprecated alias for download=true; no text parsing or inline excerpt is performed

raw_text.description: Include the primary filing document's raw decoded text inline. Use max_chars to cap response size.

max_chars.description: Maximum characters of inline raw_text to return when raw_text=true.

user_agent.description: Optional SEC User-Agent override with contact email, e.g. eli-cli (mailto:me@example.com)

name: finance_schedule
description: Earnings calendar (Nasdaq) + macro release calendar (FRED). Shows upcoming CPI, PCE, GDP, jobs, FOMC, claims, and earnings dates. Use min_cap (e.g. '50B') to filter large-cap earnings only.

major.description: Macro: keep just major US releases

macro_profile.description: Macro filtering profile. broad=all releases, market=common-watched only, major=top-tier only. The boolean `major` is a shortcut for macro_profile=major.

name: finance_auctions
description: Recent US Treasury auction results: bid-to-cover, direct/indirect bidder pct, high yield, total accepted, total tendered, CUSIP, security type, security term, auction/issue/maturity dates.

security_type.description: all, bill, note, bond, tips, frn (default: all)

name: finance_cot
description: CFTC Commitment of Traders weekly positions (specs vs commercials, longs/shorts/net, OI, week-over-week change). Released Friday for prior Tuesday. Natural query matching — use 'crude', 'gold', '10-year', 'spx', 'yen', 'treasury'. Auto-detects financial vs disaggregated report. Includes historical percentile rank across the requested window.

query.description: Natural query: gold, crude, 10-year, spx, treasury, yen, bitcoin

report.description: disaggregated (commodities) or financial (rates/FX/equity). Auto-detected if omitted

limit.description: Max distinct contracts to return (default: 15). Use higher for broad queries

name: finance_nyfed
description: NY Fed Markets data: overnight reference rates (SOFR, EFFR, OBFR, TGCR, BGCR with percentiles and volume), ON RRP facility (total amount, counterparties, rate), SOMA holdings (Fed balance sheet by security type), primary dealer positions. Real-time Fed plumbing data.

kind.description: rates (SOFR/EFFR/OBFR/TGCR/BGCR), rrp (reverse repo facility), soma (Fed balance sheet), dealers (primary dealer positions). Default: rates

name: finance_volsurface
description: CBOE volatility indices: VIX (30-day), VIX9D (9-day), VIX3M (3-month), VIX6M (6-month), VIX1Y (1-year), VVIX (vol-of-vol), OVX (oil), GVZ (gold), SKEW. Returns latest OHLC + optional history. Not a per-underlying strike/expiry implied-vol surface.

history.description: Trading days of history (default: latest only)

name: finance_stress
description: OFR Financial Stress Index (composite + credit/equity/funding/safe-assets/volatility components). Daily, updated T+1. Index is z-scored vs OFR's own historical baseline; raw values returned without categorical labeling.

name: finance_fiscal
description: Treasury fiscal data: daily national debt total (public + intragovernmental, in billions), daily Treasury operating cash balance (deposits/withdrawals), average interest rates by security type.

kind.description: debt (daily national debt), statement (Treasury cash balance), interest (avg rates by security). Default: debt

name: finance_ecb
description: ECB Statistical Data Warehouse (SDMX): EUR exchange rates, Euro STR, M3 money supply, EURIBOR term structure, euro area yield curve, Eurosystem balance sheet. No auth required. Presets or custom SDMX dataset+key.

preset.description: eurusd | fx_majors (USD/GBP/JPY/CHF/CNY) | estr (Euro Short-Term Rate) | m3 (money supply) | euribor (1M/3M/6M/12M term structure) | yield_curve (3M-30Y spot rates) | balance_sheet (Eurosystem total assets)

dataset.description: SDMX dataset ID (EXR, FM, EST, BSI, YC). Use with key.

key.description: SDMX dimension key (e.g. D.USD.EUR.SP00.A). Use with dataset.

start.description: Start period YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM. Default: 2025-01-01

end.description: End period (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM). Defaults to now.

name: finance_eia
description: EIA (U.S. Energy Information Administration): weekly petroleum inventories (crude oil, gasoline, distillate stocks) and natural gas storage. Preset-driven: crude | gasoline | distillate | all | nat_gas (or a custom `route`). Requires EIA_API_KEY env var (free registration at eia.gov/opendata).

preset.description: crude (US crude oil stocks excl SPR) | gasoline | distillate | all (crude+gasoline+distillate+Cushing) | nat_gas (Lower 48 working storage)

route.description: Custom EIA API route (e.g. petroleum/stoc/wstk/data/). Overrides preset.

name: finance_bis
description: BIS (Bank for International Settlements): global central bank policy rates, total assets, credit-to-GDP gaps, property prices, real effective exchange rates. Covers 40-50 economies. Preset-driven: policy_rates | assets | credit_gap | property | eer (or a custom SDMX dataset+key). No auth.

preset.description: policy_rates (US/EU/JP/GB/CH/CN) | assets (CB total assets in local ccy) | credit_gap (credit-to-GDP gap) | property (real residential prices) | eer (real effective exchange rates)

countries.description: Comma-separated ISO codes: US,XM(Euro area),JP,GB,CH,CN,AU,CA. Default: US,XM,JP,GB

dataset.description: BIS SDMX dataset (e.g. WS_CBPOL). Use with `key` for direct query, bypassing presets.

key.description: SDMX dimension key (e.g. M.US+XM+JP+GB). Use with `dataset`.

name: finance_boj
description: Bank of Japan: monetary base, BOJ balance sheet (total assets, JGB holdings, ETF holdings), TANKAN business sentiment DI, call rate, M2/M3 money stock, USD/JPY. Preset-driven: policy_rate | call_rate | monetary_base | balance_sheet | money_stock | tankan | fx (or custom db+codes). New Feb 2026 API, no auth.

preset.description: policy_rate | call_rate | monetary_base | balance_sheet | money_stock (M2+M3) | tankan (Mfg+Non-Mfg large DI) | fx (USD/JPY)

db.description: BOJ database name (e.g. IR01, FM01, BS01, CO). Use with codes for direct query.

name: finance_boe
description: Bank of England: Bank Rate, SONIA, gilt yields (5Y/10Y/20Y par and zero-coupon), M4 money supply, GBP exchange rates. Preset-driven: bank_rate | sonia | gilts | m4 | fx | all (or custom `codes`). CSV endpoint, no auth.

preset.description: bank_rate | sonia | gilts (5Y/10Y/20Y yields) | m4 (money supply) | fx (GBP/USD, GBP/EUR, GBP/JPY) | all (dashboard: rate+SONIA+10Y+M4+GBPUSD)

codes.description: Comma-separated BOE series codes (e.g. IUDBEDR,IUDSOIA,IUDMNPY). Use instead of preset for custom queries.

end.description: End date DD/Mon/YYYY format like 01/Jan/2026, or 'now'. Defaults to now.

name: finance_curve
description: Futures forward curve for commodities. Returns every contract month's price, front month price, back month price, raw spread (back-front), and spread_pct. Supported: oil/wti, brent, gold, silver, natgas, copper, platinum, palladium, gasoline/rbob, heating/ho.

commodity.description: Commodity to chart: oil, brent, gold, silver, natgas, copper, platinum, palladium, gasoline, heating

months.description: Number of forward months to include (default 12, max 24)

list.description: List supported commodities and exit (no curve data).
